Saat ini perusahaan sedang dalam tahap pembangunan proyek komersial area di lahan +/- 3000 sqm di daerah nongsa, diharapkan dalam 1-2 tahun proyek ini sudah selesai, mendatangkan tenant-tenant komersial (coffee shop, bakery, F&B) sehingga menciptakan lapangan kerja baru dan membuat area di Nongsa menjadi lebih hidup.
Terkait dengan tambahan aset tetap pada laporan INSW - PT. Citra Sinar Global ini adalah tambahan modal yang kita lakukan pada Q1 2026 untuk pembiayaan pembangunan proyek komersial area ini.
Di pelaporan LKPM karena status nya sudah produksi / komersil, sepertinya tidak bisa di ubah lagi modal tetap nya.
Terkait penambahan tenaga kerja tidak langsung +/- 50 orang, tenaga kerja ini merupakan tenaga kerja untuk pembangunan proyek komersial area tersebut, tenaga kerja dari kontraktor-kontraktor pembangunan.

1. NDP A & B (NKU: 202202-0313-2355-8399-640)
The Company submitted its Tax Holiday utilization application on 3 October 2025, following commercial operation declaration on 23 September 2025. As of 31 March 2026, nearly 6 months since submission, the SK Pemanfaatan has not been issued. The verification process has been slow; the first meeting was scheduled approximately 3 months after submission. The process is also intersecting with an ongoing tax audit (Surat Perintah Pemeriksaan Pajak No. PRIN-10/RIKSIS/PJ.2026, dated 19 January 2026, which formally being sent to us and received by 4 February 2026), in which the Company is actively cooperating. The Company requests that MoF and DGT complete the verification and issue the SK Pemanfaatan promptly upon conclusion of the audit process.
 
2. NDP C (NKU: 202501-2717-0540-4099-285)
The Company submitted its Tax Holiday utilization application on 26 March 2026 and has not yet received a verification schedule from DGT. The Company requests that DGT confirm a verification schedule at the earliest opportunity.
 
Pending issuance of the SK Pemanfaatan for both project locations, the Company continues to bear withholding tax obligations it would otherwise be exempt from, resulting in cash loss. This directly undermines the intended benefit of the approved incentive. The Company hopes that the relevant authorities can support the timely resolution of the outstanding approvals, so as to uphold the certainty of incentives promised to foreign investors and maintain their trust and confidence in Indonesia, especially within KEK - as a destination for any potential upcoming investment.
